issues.title: Make a second pass at removing boot dependency from model providers modules.
issues.body:
Somehow the big PR for removing boot resulted in failing tests we didn't catch, despite best efforts. 

The `ChatOptions` for various models that has `@NestedPropertyConfiguration` on them now result in test failures.

These are being disabled for now so that we can get the build green and then come back to clean it up in a separate pass.

Search for `@Disabled` with this issue number.

comments.body: This is already fixed. Closing the issue.

issues.title: Test instability in OpenAiChatModelObservationIT
issues.body:
Occasionally there is a failure in CI like this

```
24-10-31T08:59:18.3037438Z [ERROR] org.springframework.ai.openai.chat.OpenAiChatModelObservationIT.observationForStreamingChatOperation
2024-10-31T08:59:18.3039933Z [ERROR]   Run 1: OpenAiChatModelObservationIT.observationForStreamingChatOperation:125->validate:133 Observation should have contextual name equal to <chat gpt-4o-mini> but has <null>
```

tests pass locally.  Perhaps related to the use of `TestObservationRegistry` ?

comments.body: Closing this as non-issue as the test results from OpenAiChatModelObservationIT are consistently passing.

issues.title: support KAG
issues.body:
Please do a quick search on GitHub issues first, the feature you are about to request might have already been requested.

**Expected Behavior**

provider KAG feature like RAG

**Current Behavior**

nothing

**Context**

recently，AI has a new feature in augmented generation subdomain is  KAG(Knowledge Augmented Generation), that will the next generation RAG tech.

https://github.com/OpenSPG/KAG

labels.name: RAG
labels.description: Issues related to Retrieval Augmented Generation
